# Chapter 14: Maintenance failure: the slow accident  (~80 pp)
- 14.1 Maintenance neglect as a leading failure cause (12) · 14.2 Aging infrastructure (15) · 14.3 Deferred-maintenance dynamics (12) · 14.4 The political economy of maintenance (15) · 14.5 Failure section (case): Genoa Morandi Bridge, Flint water crisis, ageing nuclear plants (26)
